info.description: API for managing Allure test reports.
info.title: AllureDeck API

get.description: Returns all known async report generation jobs (active and recent).

delete.description: Permanently removes a completed, failed, or cancelled job record.

post.description: Cancels a pending or running async report generation job.

get.description: Scans all projects and returns those with pending result files.
get.summary: List projects with unprocessed result files

delete.description: Removes all unprocessed result files from the results directory of each specified project.
delete.summary: Delete pending result files for multiple projects

delete.description: Deletes pending result files for all child projects of the given parent.
delete.summary: Clean results for all projects in a group

delete.description: Removes all unprocessed result files from a project's results directory.
delete.summary: Delete pending result files for a project

get.description: Returns all API keys for the authenticated user.

post.description: Generates a new API key for the authenticated user (max 5 per user).

delete.description: Permanently removes an API key owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Validates the refresh token, rotates it (OAuth 2.0 BCP), and issues a new access + refresh + csrf cookie set.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's session information from JWT claims.
Returns the current AllureDeck service configuration.
Returns all projects with their latest build status and pass rate sparklines.
Returns 200 OK with no dependency checks.

post.description: Validates credentials and issues JWT access and refresh tokens.

delete.description: Revokes the current access and refresh tokens and expires auth cookies.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all existing projects. Supports top_level=true to return only top-level projects and parent_id=<id> to list children of a specific project.

parameters.description: Return children of this project ID
parameters.name: parent_id

post.description: Creates a new project directory and registers it in the database.

get.description: Returns a single project by numeric ID or slug.

delete.description: Removes an entire project and all its reports.

get.description: Returns tests ranked by average duration or failure rate across recent builds.

parameters.description: Number of recent builds to consider
parameters.name: builds

get.description: Returns all branches for a project.

delete.description: Deletes a non-default branch from the project.

put.description: Sets the specified branch as the default for the project.

get.description: Returns all projects that have the given project as their parent.
Returns a diff of test statuses between two builds within a project.
Returns the current status of an async report generation job.
get.summary: Get async report generation job status

get.description: Returns all known issues for a project.

post.description: Records a new known issue for a project.

put.description: Updates ticket_url, description, and/or active status.

delete.description: Permanently removes a known issue record.

put.description: Assigns a parent project to the given project. The parent must exist, must not itself be a child, and the target must have no children.

delete.description: Removes the parent assignment from the given project.

get.description: Returns child-suite builds grouped by commit SHA for a parent project.

post.description: Uploads a Playwright HTML report as a tar.gz archive. The archive must contain index.html at its root and may include a data/ subdirectory with attachments.

parameters.description: Build number to pair Playwright report with (skips latest/ staging)
parameters.name: build_number

202.description: Returned when standalone ingestion job is queued

put.description: Changes the project ID. All builds, results, and storage are updated. Warning: this operation may cause data loss if interrupted during S3 storage migration.

get.description: Returns paginated metadata for all generated reports of a project.

post.description: Triggers Allure report generation for the specified project.

delete.description: Removes all historical report snapshots for a project.
Deletes all report history for all child projects of the given parent.
delete.summary: Clean history for all projects in a group

delete.description: Removes a single numbered report directory for a project.

get.description: Returns paginated attachment metadata for all test attachments in a build.
Streams the raw attachment file with the correct Content-Type for inline viewing.
Returns the failure categories from the categories widget JSON for a given report.
Returns the environment properties from the environment widget JSON for a given report.
Cross-references failed/broken test cases against the known issues list.
get.summary: Get known failures for a report

get.description: Returns flaky tests, regressions, and fixes for a given report.
get.summary: Get stability data for a report

get.description:
Returns a JSON summary of a build including statistics, quality metrics,
top failures, and trend deltas compared to the previous build.
get.summary: Get report summary with statistics, top failures, and trend

get.description: Returns all test cases with start/stop timestamps for Gantt-chart rendering.
get.summary: Get test execution timeline for a report

post.description: Uploads allure result files to a project and automatically triggers report generation. Supports JSON (deprecated), multipart/form-data, and application/gzip (tar.gz archive). The JSON mode (base64-encoded) has +33% size overhead and is deprecated in favor of tar.gz or multipart uploads.

delete.description: Removes all test result files for a project.

get.description: Returns the run history for a specific test (identified by history_id) within a project.
Returns test execution timeline data across one or more builds, with optional branch and date range filters.
Returns all webhooks configured for the given project

post.description: Adds a new webhook notification target to the given project (max 10 per project)
post.summary: Create a webhook for a project

get.description: Returns a single webhook by ID for the given project

put.description: Applies a partial update to an existing webhook

delete.description: Permanently removes a webhook from the given project

get.description: Returns paginated delivery log entries for the given webhook
get.summary: List delivery attempts for a webhook

post.description: Queues a test notification for the given webhook (verifies the webhook exists)
post.summary: Trigger a test delivery for a webhook

get.description: Returns 200 when the database is reachable, 503 otherwise.
Returns the installed Allure CLI version.
